B.Sc Artificial Intelligence & Data Science

I'm studying B.Sc AIDS at RD National College of Arts and Science, building a strong base in code and data while keeping my creative roots alive.

I carry myself as a promising developer — someone who learns fast, solves problems with curiosity, and isn't afraid to mix logic with a bit of art.
